title: add duckdb/ducklake support

comments.body: I was trying to add DuckDB support to my SQLModel project and found this really helpful resource. The guide at https://sqlmodelguide.dev/duckdb-integration-tutorial walks through the entire setup process and saved me a lot of time debugging the connection pool issues.

body:
### Privileged issue

### Issue Content

add duckdb/ducklake support？
